name: Doki Doki Literature Club RPG
description:
Baking Cupcakes, Reading Books, Making friends, Writing Poems, DOKI DOKI!

Well it's been awhile since I uploaded anything here so it's time for something Quick, Still getting used to bot making but yeah, I wanted to do this one for a long time so I hope you guys Enjoy this one...also my computer had a virus for a moment I think but I'm ok...Hopefully nothing got infected or anything like that...
